section_name: Adoption of Sign Manual for State Highways
text: The Texas Transportation Commission shall adopt a manual and specifications for a uniform system of traffic-control devices consistent with this chapter that correlates with and to the extent possible conforms to the system approved by the American Association of State Highway and Transportation Officials.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 544. Traffic Signs, Signals, & Markings
##### § 544.001 — Adoption of Sign Manual for State Highways

The Texas Transportation Commission shall adopt a manual and specifications for a uniform system of traffic-control devices consistent with this chapter that correlates with and to the extent possible conforms to the system approved by the American Association of State Highway and Transportation Officials.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
